message: TDD implementation complete for Issue #565. All 6 phases implemented: copilot-constants, COPILOT_SKIP_PATTERNS extension, prompt-dedup module, TUI accumulator Copilot support (extractCopilotContentLines, normalizeCopilotLine, accumulateTuiContent cliToolId parameter), cleanCopilotResponse with normalizeCopilotLine DRY reuse, resolveExtractionStartIndex Copilot branch, response-poller integration (accumulateTuiContent call, duplicate prompt prevention, accumulated content save flow), delay constant unification across 3 files, and cleanup integration.
